description: Style Notefabindia's natural, craft-based pieces reference ethnic garments and fabric.  This stylish stole perfectly captures the traditional mood of the moment with its Chanderi patterning. Chanderi fabric is renowned for its very fine gossamer quality, placement of motifs and design intricacy, and has been the chosen fabric for saris produced for the royalty.The fabric's unique qualities result from the traditional method of sizing and hand weaving developed over the centuries. Twist it into a stylish knot or wrap it around your shoulders and feel the luxe fabric on your skin. Product DetailsGrey printed stole with hemmed sidesMaterial and CareSilk/cotton Chanderi printedDry clean onlySizeApproximate Length: 190 cmApproximate width: 55 cm
